mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) as "totalOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE state_id IN ('DELIVERED', 'SHIPPED', 'CONFIRMED')) as "activeOrders", (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED')) as "totalRevenue", (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders) as "totalCustomers", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE state_id = 'PUBLISHED') as "publishedProducts", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE state_id = 'UNDER_REVIEW') as "pendingReviewProducts", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE') as "activeSuppliers", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED')) as "openTickets"
SELECT state_id as "state", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM orders GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM orders

SELECT o.id as "id", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.state_id as "stateId", o.total_amount as "total", o.currency as "currency", o.created_time as "createdTime", o.item_count as "itemCount", o.customer_id as "customerId" FROM orders o ORDER BY o.created_time DESC ${pagination}

SELECT count(*) FROM inventory_item inv JOIN product_variants pv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id JOIN products p ON pv.product_id = p.id WHERE inv.available_quantity <= inv.low_stock_threshold AND p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT inv.variant_id as "variantId", pv.sku as "sku", p.id as "productId", p.name as "productName", inv.available_quantity as "availableQuantity", inv.low_stock_threshold as "threshold", inv.reserved_quantity as "reservedQuantity" FROM inventory_item inv JOIN product_variants pv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id JOIN products p ON pv.product_id = p.id WHERE inv.available_quantity <= inv.low_stock_threshold AND p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY inv.available_quantity ASC ${pagination}

SELECT count(DISTINCT p.id) FROM products p JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id WHERE p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' AND (inv.available_quantity IS NULL OR inv.available_quantity = 0)

SELECT p.id as "productId", p.name as "productName", pv.id as "variantId", pv.sku as "sku" FROM products p JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id WHERE p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' AND (inv.available_quantity IS NULL OR inv.available_quantity = 0) ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(DISTINCT s.id) FROM supplier s WHERE s.state_id = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT s.id as "supplierId", s.business_name as "businessName", s.state_id as "supplierState", COUNT(DISTINCT o_offer.id) as "activeOffers", COUNT(DISTINCT ord.id) as "totalOrders", COALESCE(SUM(ord.total_amount), 0) as "totalRevenue" FROM supplier s LEFT JOIN offer o_offer ON o_offer.supplier_id = s.id AND o_offer.state_id = 'LIVE' LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN orders ord ON oi.order_id = ord.id AND ord.state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') WHERE s.state_id = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY s.id, s.business_name, s.state_id ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT state_id as "state", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM returnrequest GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM support_tickets WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED')

SELECT t.id as "ticketId", t.state_id as "ticketState", t.subject as "subject", t.priority as "priority", t.customer_id as "customerId", t.order_id as "orderId", t.created_time as "createdTime", t.assigned_agent_id as "assignedTo" FROM support_tickets t WHERE t.state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED') ORDER BY CASE t.priority WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, t.created_time ASC ${pagination}

SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED')) as "totalRevenue", (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') AND DATE(created_time) = CURRENT_DATE) as "todayRevenue", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM settlements WHERE state_id = 'DISBURSED') as "disbursedSettlements", (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_amount), 0) FROM settlements WHERE state_id = 'DISBURSED') as "totalPayouts", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM settlements WHERE state_id = 'PENDING') as "pendingSettlements", (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_amount), 0) FROM settlements WHERE state_id = 'PENDING') as "pendingPayoutAmount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM settlements WHERE state_id = 'DISPUTED') as "disputedSettlements", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment WHERE state_id = 'REFUNDED') as "totalRefunds", (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payment WHERE state_id = 'REFUNDED') as "totalRefundAmount"

SELECT summary_date as "date", COALESCE(total_revenue, 0) as "revenue", COALESCE(total_orders, 0) as "orderCount" FROM daily_sales_summary WHERE summary_date >= CURRENT_DATE - COALESCE(#{days}, 30) ORDER BY summary_date ASC
SELECT state_id as "state", COUNT(*) as "count", COALESCE(SUM(net_amount), 0) as "totalAmount" FROM settlements GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY "count" DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM offer WHERE state_id = 'LIVE' AND supplier_id = #{supplierId}) as "activeProducts", (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ord.id) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders ord ON oi.order_id = ord.id WHERE ord.state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') AND oi.supplier_id = #{supplierId}) as "totalOrders", (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders ord ON oi.order_id = ord.id WHERE ord.state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') AND oi.supplier_id = #{supplierId}) as "totalRevenue", COALESCE((SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'), 0) as "averageRating", 0 as "productsChange", 0 as "ordersChange", 0 as "revenueChange"

SELECT DATE(ord.created_time) as "date", COUNT(DISTINCT ord.id) as "orderCount", COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) as "revenue" FROM order_items oi JOIN orders ord ON oi.order_id = ord.id WHERE 1=1 AND oi.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND ord.state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') AND ord.created_time >= CURRENT_DATE - COALESCE(#{days}, 30) GROUP BY DATE(ord.created_time) ORDER BY "date" ASC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oi.product_id) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders ord ON oi.order_id = ord.id WHERE 1=1 AND oi.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND ord.state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED')

SELECT oi.product_id as "productId", p.name as "productName", COUNT(DISTINCT ord.id) as "orderCount", SUM(oi.quantity) as "unitsSold", COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) as "revenue" FROM order_items oi JOIN orders ord ON oi.order_id = ord.id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE 1=1 AND oi.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND ord.state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') GROUP BY oi.product_id, p.name ORDER BY "revenue" DESC ${pagination}

SELECT DISTINCT ord.id as "orderId", ord.state_id as "orderState", ord.total_amount as "totalAmount", ord.currency as "currency", ord.created_time as "createdTime", ord.item_count as "itemCount" FROM order_items oi JOIN orders ord ON oi.order_id = ord.id WHERE 1=1 AND oi.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY ord.created_time DESC ${pagination}

SELECT otl.tax_type as "taxType", otl.rate_applied as "taxRate", COALESCE(SUM(otl.tax_amount), 0) as "totalTaxAmount", COUNT(*) as "lineCount" FROM order_tax_lines otl JOIN orders ord ON otl.order_id = ord.id WHERE ord.state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') AND ord.created_time >= #{startDate} AND ord.created_time <= #{endDate} GROUP BY otl.tax_type, otl.rate_applied ORDER BY "totalTaxAmount" DESC
